name: Concert Punk Carousel
aesthetic: Punk gig poster — flat saturated background (skyblue/magenta/neon), halftone-processed black-and-white artist photo, graffiti marker headline (yellow outlined scribble behind red scratch-letters), grunge splatter + chalk scratch marks, sticker badges for price/date, distressed paper feel. Raw, loud, xerox-copied.

theme_vars.--concert-bg: flat background color — pick a loud saturated tone per artist/genre (punk=sky-blue, pop=hot-pink, rap=acid-green, metal=blood-red)
theme_vars.--slash: fill color of red-marker text (usually red)

slides.subject: Halftone B&W artist portrait dominates the top; graffiti headline underneath (artist name in yellow-outlined scribble behind red scratched sub-line); sticker badges for price + date in top-right; date/time in bottom-left; venue block in bottom-right.
Restaurant photo in scratched panel with grunge border; graffiti 'EAT FIRST' title; distance-from-venue chip; restaurant name, neighbourhood, dish bullets.
Mirror of slide 2 — 'LATE BITE' or 'AFTER PARTY' title, second restaurant photo, open-until chip, dish bullets.
Graffiti 'IF YOU LIKE {ARTIST}' headline → 'YOU NEED {CUISINE}' with a third restaurant photo; grunge arrow or splatter; bridge copy explains the pairing.

copy.bridgeLine: a one-liner on why this pairs

slides.subject: Grunge-bordered CTA over theme bg with scratches, BiteMap logo (transparent), 'full tour guide on' banner, app badges.
slides.copy: Fixed: 'full tour guide on' / BiteMap logo / tagline / app badges

inputs_required.artistImageUrl: string — high-contrast portrait or performance photo, will be desaturated + halftoned
inputs_required.city: string — host city for nearby restaurants
inputs_required.theme: object — { bg: '#2DB2E6', scribble: '#FFEB3B', slash: '#E74135' }. Swap per artist/genre.

copy_rules: Headlines are UPPERCASE, short (4-8 letters), scratched and loud
The 'IF YOU LIKE X / YOU NEED Y' formula is the core creative beat — don't soften it
Distance and open-until chips must have real numbers, never vague ('close by' banned)
Restaurant names are real and verified — same rules as match_comic
Cuisine pairings should be specific and defensible (SZA → soul food, Bad Bunny → mofongo, Taylor Swift → brunch)
Price sticker only appears if known
asset_rules: Artist photo must be high-contrast enough to survive halftone conversion — avoid flat studio lighting
Restaurant photos should be dish close-ups or signage, not interior shots
Min 1080px wide; real photos only (no AI)
use_when: Any concert at any host city during FIFA 2026 window
Major tour stops where fan-bases concentrate in specific neighbourhoods
Late-night after-show content pushed 2-3 hours before doors
Genre-defining artists where cuisine pairing is obvious
